baskets.name: survival
baskets.description:
The basket many Romanians actually live on: shelter, basic food, transit, utilities, phone.
No car, no dining out, no subscriptions.

baskets.name: middle_class
baskets.description:
A typical Western-European middle-class lifestyle: larger apartment, better food,
car ownership, dining out twice a week, gym, subscriptions, one vacation amortized.

baskets.name: global
baskets.description:
Tradable goods and services that price nearly identically across the EU.
phone, laptop, streaming, an intra-EU flight. Exposes where PPS lies most.

baskets.name: housing_only
baskets.description:
Rent + utilities + amortized purchase price for a 60m² apartment in the capital.
Isolates the single category that most distorts PPS comparisons.

items.rent_1br_outside_center_capital: Rent for a 1-bedroom apartment outside the city center of the capital
items.rent_2br_good_area_capital: Rent for a 2-bedroom apartment in a decent area of the capital
items.apartment_purchase_price_per_m2_capital: Purchase price per m² for an apartment in the capital (secondary market, outside prime center)
items.electricity_kwh: Household electricity, per kWh, including VAT
items.gas_kwh: Household natural gas, per kWh, including VAT
items.internet_100mbps_monthly: Fixed home internet, ~100 Mbps plan, per month
items.public_transit_monthly_pass: Monthly public transit pass in the capital (all zones / central zone)
items.car_purchase_vw_golf_equivalent: VW Golf (or equivalent C-segment) new, base trim, on-road price
items.car_insurance_annual: Full comprehensive car insurance for a C-segment car, 35yo driver, capital
items.bread_loaf_500g: White bread loaf, ~500g, supermarket own-brand or generic
items.milk_1l: Whole cow's milk, 1L carton, mid-range brand
items.eggs_10: Chicken eggs, 10-pack, size M, cage-free or equivalent
items.chicken_breast_1kg: Fresh chicken breast fillet, per kg
items.restaurant_mid_range_meal: Mid-range restaurant meal, one person, main course + drink
items.phone_plan_monthly: Mobile postpaid plan with unlimited calls and ~20GB data
items.iphone_15_128gb: Apple iPhone 15, 128GB, new, official Apple Store price
items.laptop_macbook_air_m3: Apple MacBook Air M3 13", 8GB/256GB base, new
items.intra_eu_flight_return: Return economy flight, ~1500km intra-EU, 3 weeks advance, low-cost or legacy
items.playstation_5_disc: Sony PlayStation 5 (disc edition), new, retailer price
items.big_mac: McDonalds Big Mac, single burger, per unit
items.vacation_week_abroad: One week of modest foreign vacation (mid-tier hotel + meals + basic activities), 2 people, total cost
